name: gobj-ui-test-app
description: Declarative-shell demo for @yuneta/gobj-ui (v2). Showcases every C_YUI_NAV menu layout — vertical, icon-bar, tabs, side submenu, cards (section-index) + backbar, drawer and accordion — plus the per-zone responsive model (same primary menu in the left rail on desktop and the bottom icon-bar on mobile). No backend: pure gobj tree + hash routing.
